videos.title: Scientists Finally Figured Out What Love Is For
videos.author: Be Smart
videos.description:
The dumb things we do for love make a lot more sense than you think…
↓↓↓ More info and sources below ↓↓↓

Love makes people do ridiculous things: quit jobs, cross continents, build monuments, and ignore every red flag in sight. But what if that's exactly what love evolved to do? This video explores
